chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1240 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.10.2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General along with Sanaullah Chachar, SHO /Sub-Inspector NCCIA circle Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- DAG files parawise comments of Sanaullah Chachar, SHO/ Sub-Inspector NCCIA Circle Sukkur, along with certain documents, same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the petitioner present in person. SHO, submitted that on the complaint of petitioner the enquiry bearing No.195/2025 has been initiated, same will be decided within twenty days. At his statement petition is hereby disposed of, with direction to said SHO to complete the same enquiry within above mentioned period and furnish such report before Additional Registrar of this Court. Accordingly instant petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
